goal: Make the Celtic Cross (full) reading result share via the poster flow instead of a bare Save Image download
done: Added state.mode === 'full' to the Share branch of configureSaveButton in js/reading.js, so the celtic result's primary button is 'Share'/'แชร์' wired to openSharePage() (poster) like daily/question.
symptom: On the Celtic Cross result the primary action button read 'Save image' and did a plain canvas download instead of generating the share poster.
root_cause: configureSaveButton routed only 'daily' and 'question' to the Share->openSharePage path; 'full' fell through to the saveImage() branches ('Save image' / dict.save), despite the poster pipeline supporting the celtic payload (isCelticCrossPosterPayload, renderCelticCrossPoster) and share.js handling mode 'full'.
fix: Include 'full' in the Share branch condition so it gets 'Share' + openSharePage().
verified: chrome-devtools edited file: #saveBtn on celtic result now 'Share' (was 'Save image')
openSharePage proven end-to-end on live daily: click -> navigates to /share/#p=... poster page
affects: full / Celtic Cross reading result share button (EN + TH)
notes: cardSheetSaveBtn ('Save Image' inside the per-card 'Read Card Meaning' sheet) is a separate single-card-meaning save, left as-is. Local celtic E2E blocked only by CDN CORS on localhost. Mirror sync deferred (BUG-015).
